meta.title: Expansion Panel
meta.description: Panel that can be easily expanded and collapsed in place — built around the OSD Viewer's Side Expansion Panel.

hero.title: Expansion Panel
hero.desc: Expansion Panel is a panel that can be expanded and collapsed inline within the page.

usage.title: Usage
usage.desc: Zoomable's canonical Side Expansion Panel is the work panel surfaced during OSD Viewer tasks. Its contents are composed from various components depending on purpose. Side Expansion Panel typically anchors to either the left or right side of the page.
usage.ruleText: A vertical surface containing the actions available for the page within its panel area. It carries a dedicated Button area at the bottom.

variants.title: Variants
variants.desc: Zoomable's canonical Side Expansion Panel is the work panel surfaced during OSD Viewer tasks. Its contents are composed from various components depending on purpose. Side Expansion Panel typically anchors to either the left or right side of the page.

fold.title: Panel Fold
fold.desc: Side Panel can be folded and unfolded based on usage. The Icon Button that triggers this action surfaces on hover at the panel edge. Unlike GNB, the collapsed state collapses down to a single icon button.

scroll.title: Scroll Bar
scroll.desc: When panel items exceed the visible area, a Scroll Bar appears. The Scroll Area is sized to the items' bounds.
